assertion: legacy source snapshot is immutable and fingerprinted
every migrated source has explicit mapped/transformed/split/merged/quarantine/reject/not-migrated decision
different existing target fingerprint causes quarantine, never overwrite
migration transformer cannot remain runtime semantic authority
source-to-target map pins exact target revisions and fingerprints
replaying identical migration does not create divergent targets
rollback tombstones only exact target revisions first created by its batch
rollback blocks when later non-migration dependents exist
legacy corrections/retractions migrate as history rather than overwritten final blob
migrated learned structures remain candidate unless normal promotion authority exists
equivalence compares semantic dimensions, not output string similarity
intentional behavior difference requires exact reviewed fixture lineage
untestable or differing dimensions cannot be labeled fully equivalent
merged migration pins every exact source and one exact merged target; split pins one exact source and multiple targets
rerunning the same exact logical migration batch returns the existing committed batch despite later store revisions
intentional change waivers cannot mask differences outside their exact approved fixture pins
a merged target record depends on every exact source pin represented by its migration target map
